code:
import io
import string

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int, _ default: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    default
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or(text, i, -1)
    if b == -1
      i = n
    else if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut token = ""
      mut collecting = true
      while collecting
        if i >= n
          collecting = false
        else
          let c = byte_or(text, i, -1)
          if c == -1 or is_ws(c)
            collecting = false
          else
            token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
            i = i + 1
          end
        end
      end
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
